chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-4219 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge FRESH CASE. 1. For orders on Office Objection. 2. For orders on Misc. No.18637/2024. 3. For orders on Misc. No.18638/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 18.09.2024. Mr. Manzoor Ahmed Soomro, Advocate for the Petitioner. ---- 1. Deferred. 2. Exemption is allowed subject to all just exceptions. 3&4. The Petitioner has invoked the jurisdiction of this Court under Article 199 of the Constitution, praying that the official Respondents be restrained from dispossessing him from a medical store within the precincts of the Sindh Government Qatar Hospital, situated in Orangi Town, Karachi until final disposal of Suit No.1836/2024 pending before the learned VIII Senior Civil Judge, Karachi, West. A copy of the plaint of that Suit has been filed today under cover of a Statement, which is taken on record. A perusal of said plaint reflects that Prayer Clause “B” thereof essentially elicits the same relief as has been sought in the matter at hand. Needless to say, the Petitioner cannot agitate the matter before two forums and ought to pursue the suit already instituted on the subject. Under such circumstances, we hereby dismiss the Petition in limine, along with the other miscellaneous application. JUDGE JUDGE MUBASHIR
